SetBonus.4: When the equipper triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color>, their Anomaly Proficiency increases by 48 for 30s; repeated triggers reset the duration. When the equipper triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Freeze</color> effect, their All-Attribute Anomaly DMG and <color=#FFFFFF>Disorder</color> DMG increase by 16% for 30s; repeated triggers reset the duration.
